# Receipts Print and Send

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Adds a button to Send and Print Receipts
Adds a new mail template for receipts

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

1. Go to Invoicing -> Configuration and activate -> Customer Invoices -> "Sale Receipt"

## Usage

1. Go to Invoicing -> Customers - > Receipts -> Create a new receipt
2. Select a customer and a product and confirm it
3. Click Send & Print button
